subcodes.first_line: O breeze of paradise! Waft thou over all created things, even as the holy breezes have wafted upon thee from this direction [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا نسیم الفردوس هب علی الممکنات بما هبت علیک نسائم القدس من  هذالشطر
